overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through urban streets at night. The character moves along commercial sidewalks, turns into a narrow alleyway, exits back to the street, and crosses an intersection with traffic lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with outdoor dining seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city sidewalk past commercial buildings with outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange shirt walking toward camera on the sidewalk
pedestrian standing near the outdoor seating umbrellas

entered.detail: multi-story building with large windows and illuminated signage
blue umbrellas with red planter base arranged along the sidewalk
tall street lamps casting yellow-orange light on the pavement

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial city sidewalk at night, passing by buildings with outdoor dining areas covered by blue umbrellas. Streetlights illuminate the scene with warm yellow light as pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley between commercial buildings

events.description: turns right into narrow alleyway between yellow and white buildings

agents.ego_description: turning right off the main sidewalk into a narrow alleyway between buildings

entered.detail: yellow-painted building facade with windows and air conditioning units
plain white industrial building wall with loading dock
large metal waste container against the yellow building

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed alleyway between a yellow building on the left and a white industrial wall on the right. The space is dimly lit by artificial light from windows, with no pedestrians present.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with commercial building facades

events.description: exits the alleyway turning left back onto the main street sidewalk
character's hand becomes visible in lower frame indicating first-person perspective

agents.ego_description: turning left to exit the alley and continuing along the building facade toward an intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: building front with awning and illuminated entrance
overhead traffic signal showing green light

segments.scene_description: Exiting the alley back onto the main street, the camera follows a pedestrian toward an intersection. The character's hand becomes visible in the frame as they walk past commercial building facades with illuminated awnings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

events.description: traffic light changes from green to red while waiting at the corner
begins crossing the street alongside a pedestrian as vehicles approach

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection corner then crossing the street with a pedestrian as traffic stops

notable_agents.action: bald pedestrian in gray jacket crossing the street alongside the camera

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
car with headlights on approaching the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching a wide urban intersection, the camera waits as the traffic light changes from green to red, then crosses the marked crosswalk alongside a bald pedestrian. Vehicles are visible waiting at the red light as the crossing begins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling commercial sidewalk through a secluded alleyway and back into the flow of urban traffic. It begins by moving past outdoor dining areas with blue umbrellas under the warm yellow glow of city streetlights. As the camera leaves the main thoroughfare, the scene shifts into a narrow, dimly lit alleyway enclosed by a yellow building and a white industrial wall. The perspective then emerges from the enclosure back onto the street, following a pedestrian past illuminated awnings while the character's hand becomes visible in the frame. Finally, the movement leads to a wide intersection where the camera pauses for a traffic light to change before crossing the marked crosswalk alongside another pedestrian as vehicles wait at the red light.
